note: Compound v3 MainnetBulker. COVER = invoke (parallel-array tagged batch -> Multicall of supply/withdraw/transfer/claim/native-wrap/stETH sub-bodies; the user pre-sign entrypoint). sweepNativeToken/sweepToken are admin token-recovery; transferAdmin is admin-only.

0x555029a6.name: invoke
0x555029a6.reason: user batch entrypoint: invoke(bytes32[] actions, bytes[] data) -> Multicall via parallel_tagged_dispatch (8 ACTION_* tags: supply/withdraw/transfer/claim + native/stETH variants)

0xb660c156.name: sweepNativeToken
0xb660c156.reason: admin token-recovery: sweeps stuck native token to admin, not a user pre-sign action

0x258836fe.name: sweepToken
0x258836fe.reason: admin token-recovery: sweeps a stuck ERC20 to admin, not a user pre-sign action

0x75829def.name: transferAdmin
0x75829def.reason: admin-only: transfers the Bulker admin role
